---
name: snowflake-modeling
description: Use when Snowflake connection posture, object naming, or query support is needed.
---

# Snowflake Modeling Skill

1. Use `inspect_snowflake` to understand configured auth posture.
2. Use `propose_snowflake_objects` only for draft object names.
3. Keep Snowflake objects flexible and task-specific.
4. Do not encode actuarial conclusions in SQL without review.
